name: Jacob — Referral Partner stage → Ignition log

meta.description: Import on pilot.ignitionsystems.io. 1) GHL Workflow: when opportunity stage → Referral Partner, POST full payload to this webhook. 2) Set n8n env: IGNITION_REFERRAL_LOG_URL (e.g. https://ignition-jacob.vercel.app/api/jacob/referral-partners/log), JACOB_REFERRAL_PARTNER_WEBHOOK_SECRET (same as Vercel). 3) Adjust Code node field paths after one live GHL execution. 4) Sheet tab 'Referral Partner Log' + header row (see admin/jacob/referral-partners).

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  receivedAt: $json.receivedAt,
  event: $json.event,
  ghlContactId: $json.ghlContactId,
  ghlOpportunityId: $json.ghlOpportunityId,
  contactName: $json.contactName,
  pipelineStageName: $json.pipelineStageName,
  opportunitySource: $json.opportunitySource,
  notes: $json.notes,
  raw: $json.raw
}) }}
